identity.name: Wix.com Ltd.
identity.summary: Website-building and business SaaS platform, HQ in Tel Aviv; NASDAQ: WIX.

company.blurb: Wix provides a cloud platform for building and running websites and online businesses.
company.direction: Public company leaning hard into AI site-generation and its Studio product for agencies over the last year.
watch_fors: Frontend depth at scale — Wix's editor is a massive client-side app; expect rendering-performance questions.
They grade for craft and attention to UX detail.
Component architecture and state management come up.
Know their move toward AI-assisted site building.
Large org — show you can navigate cross-team dependencies.
